hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验；【FINANCE】比特币正在崩溃，但华尔街新的加密货币炒作正在兴起；【FINANCE】投资者可能会在哪里找到人工智能贸易的下一个“大浪潮”。

items.title: Hot jobs report puts Fed cuts further out of reach as Chair Warsh faces policy tests
items.summary: Another big jobs report in May has swept aside the possibility of interest rate cuts anytime soon.
items.title_zh: 热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验
items.summary_zh: 五月份的另一份重要就业报告排除了近期降息的可能性。

items.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
items.summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.
items.title_zh: 比特币正在崩溃，但华尔街新的加密货币炒作正在兴起
items.summary_zh: 随着比特币跌至 2024 年以来的最低价格，投资者纷纷涌向与超流动性平台相关的新型加密货币投资——HYPE ETF。

items.title: Where investors may find the next 'big wave' for AI trade
items.summary: Tim Urbanowicz, chief investment strategist at Innovator from Goldman Sachs Asset Management, tackles the AI boom.
items.title_zh: 投资者可能会在哪里找到人工智能贸易的下一个“大浪潮”
items.summary_zh: 高盛资产管理公司 Innovator 首席投资策略师 Tim Urbanowicz 应对人工智能热潮。

items.title: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
items.summary: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗警告停止袭击，以色列仍对黎巴嫩城市提尔发动空袭
items.summary_zh: 伊朗周一警告以色列，如果不停止对其黎巴嫩盟友真主党的袭击，伊朗可能会恢复敌对行动。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Launches Strikes on Iran; Tehran Claims Attacks on U.S. Fleet
items.summary: The exchange came after President Trump said Iranian forces had shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国对伊朗发动打击；德黑兰声称美国舰队遭到袭击
items.summary_zh: 此次交流是在特朗普总统表示伊朗军队在霍尔木兹海峡附近击落一架美国阿帕奇直升机之后进行的。

items.title: The Roar of ‘Cease-Fire’ in a Once-Thriving City
items.summary: The city of Nabatieh once spoke to the changing fortunes of Lebanon. Now, amid unending war, it speaks to the country’s worst fears.
items.title_zh: 曾经繁荣的城市中“停火”的咆哮
items.summary_zh: 纳巴蒂耶城曾经讲述过黎巴嫩命运的变化。现在，在无休止的战争中，它说出了这个国家最严重的恐惧。

items.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何围绕人工智能代理重新设计软件交付
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 AI 代理、ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 来加速软件交付、自动化工作流程并在整个企业中构建 AI 原生文化。

items.title: Drones Stray Into Neighboring Countries as Russia and Ukraine Battle
items.summary: Drones launched by both Russia and Ukraine are veering off course, menacing countries that are not at war and driving their citizens to seek shelter.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯和乌克兰交战时无人机误入邻国
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯和乌克兰发射的无人机正在偏离航线，对未处于战争状态的国家构成威胁，并迫使其公民寻求庇护。

items.title: Come back after the summer, says one analyst on crypto markets
items.summary: Bitcoin's growing divergence from tech stocks raises concerns as AI spending surges, says Quinn Thompson.
items.title_zh: 一位加密货币市场分析师表示，夏天过后再来吧
items.summary_zh: 奎因·汤普森 (Quinn Thompson) 表示，随着人工智能支出激增，比特币与科技股的差距越来越大，引发了担忧。

items.title: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
items.summary: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.
items.title_zh: 缅甸境内，武装分子正在节节败退，军队将男子编入军队
items.summary_zh: BBC 随叛乱分子前往缅甸前线阵地，了解战争的进展情况。

items.title: Murder of Lyhanna, 11, enrages France and turns up heat on government
items.summary: Protesters are angry that the suspect had already been reported to police last August in a separate case.
items.title_zh: 11 岁莱哈娜 (Lyhanna) 被杀激怒法国并激怒政府
items.summary_zh: 抗议者对嫌疑人去年八月在另一起案件中向警方报案感到愤怒。

items.title: UK and allies sanction 'networks' enabling settler violence in West Bank
items.summary: France will also bar far-right Israeli Minister Bezalel Smotrich from entry as part of the measures, which Israel condemns as "disgraceful".
items.title_zh: 英国及其盟国制裁促成约旦河西岸定居者暴力的“网络”
items.summary_zh: 作为这些措施的一部分，法国还将禁止以色列极右翼部长贝扎莱尔·斯莫特里奇入境，以色列谴责此举“可耻”。

items.title: 5 corruption gaps Congress must close in the Clarity Act
items.summary: The most consequential crypto legislation in the world is moving forward in the U.S. Senate. As written, it leaves the United States exposed to money laundering, sanctions evasion, and conflicts of interest at the highest levels of government, argues Greytak.
items.title_zh: 国会必须在《澄清法案》中弥补 5 个腐败漏洞
items.summary_zh: 世界上最重要的加密立法正在美国参议院取得进展。格雷塔克认为，正如所写的那样，这使美国面临洗钱、逃避制裁和政府最高层利益冲突的风险。

items.title: Washington man gets 5 years for helping $100 million crypto money laundering scheme
items.summary: Geoffrey K. Auyeung helped overseas fraudsters launder $100 million in scam proceeds through crypto and bank accounts, according to the DOJ.
items.title_zh: 华盛顿男子因帮助价值 1 亿美元的加密货币洗钱计划被判 5 年徒刑
items.summary_zh: 据司法部称，Geoffrey K. Auyeung 帮助海外欺诈者通过加密货币和银行账户洗钱 1 亿美元的诈骗收益。

items.title: Warren calls weakened CFTC a ‘recipe for disaster’ as Congress advances crypto legislation
items.summary: Senator Warren requested records related to staff departures, prediction market oversight and internal communications on the Clarity Act.
items.title_zh: 沃伦称随着国会推进加密货币立法，CFTC 的削弱是“灾难的秘诀”
items.summary_zh: 沃伦参议员要求提供与员工离职、预测市场监督和《澄清法案》内部沟通相关的记录。

items.title: Backpack US appoints former SEC Acting Chairman Piwowar to board amid push for crypto perps
items.summary: Michael S. Piwowar was appointed by President Barack Obama and served as an SEC commissioner from 2013 to 2018.
items.title_zh: Backpack US 任命前 SEC 代理主席 Piwowar 为董事会成员，推动加密货币行业的发展
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·皮沃瓦尔 (Michael S. Piwowar) 由巴拉克·奥巴马 (Barack Obama) 总统任命，并于 2013 年至 2018 年担任 SEC 专员。

items.title: GSR receives FINRA approval to complete broker-dealer acquisition
items.summary: GSR first announced it would acquire the Portland-based, SEC-registered broker-dealer Equilibrium Capital Services in October 2025.
items.title_zh: GSR 获得 FINRA 批准完成经纪交易商收购
items.summary_zh: GSR 首次宣布将于 2025 年 10 月收购总部位于波特兰、在 SEC 注册的经纪自营商 Equilibrium Capital Services。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Economic Research Exchange to study AI’s impact on jobs, productivity, and the economy. Applications are now open for selected research projects.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 经济研究交流中心简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发起经济研究交流，以研究人工智能对就业、生产力和经济的影响。选定的研究项目现已开放申请。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: MIT researchers teach AI models to interpret charts
items.summary: The new ChartNet training dataset could improve the accuracy of vision-language models that help analyze business trends or interpret scientific figures.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员教人工智能模型解释图表
items.summary_zh: 新的 ChartNet 训练数据集可以提高视觉语言模型的准确性，帮助分析业务趋势或解释科学数据。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Kalshi trading in 'perps' crosses $1 billion in volume within a week of launch
items.summary: A spokesperson for the company said that the product is the fastest growing in the prediction market platform's history.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 的“perps”交易量在推出一周内就突破了 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司发言人表示，该产品是预测市场平台历史上增长最快的产品。

items.summary: Uniswap (UNI), down 2.9% from Monday, joined Aave (AAVE) as an underperformer.

items.summary_zh: Uniswap (UNI) 较周一下跌 2.9%，与 Aave (AAVE) 一样表现不佳。

items.title: Bitcoin inflows slow sharply in 2026 as investors chase AI, Bernstein says
items.summary: Bernstein said bitcoin's increasingly diversified ownership base supports its long-term store-of-value thesis.
items.title_zh: 伯恩斯坦表示，随着投资者追逐人工智能，2026 年比特币流入大幅放缓
items.summary_zh: 伯恩斯坦表示，比特币日益多元化的所有权基础支持其长期价值储存理论。

items.title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.summary: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.
items.title_zh: 向 GPT-Rosalind 引入新功能
items.summary_zh: GPT-Rosalind 通过增强的生物推理、药物化学专业知识、基因组学分析和实验工作流程功能推进生命科学研究。

items.title_zh: North Mini Code 简介：Cohere 为开发人员提供的第一个模型

items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.

items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通计划今年部署更强大的人工智能代理
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，长期运行的人工智能代理即将消除阻碍大公司内部采用的安全和治理障碍。

items.title: Electric vehicle giant BYD predicts 80% of China car sales will soon be electric
items.summary: BYD expects China's competitive electric vehicle market to continue growing, even as manufacturers and analysts anticipate domestic demand to taper further.
items.title_zh: 电动汽车巨头比亚迪预测中国汽车销量的80%很快将是电动汽车
items.summary_zh: 比亚迪预计，尽管制造商和分析师预计国内需求将进一步减少，但中国竞争激烈的电动汽车市场将继续增长。

items.title: This startup wants to reduce payment friction on prediction markets
items.summary: EDGE Markets is announcing two new products to solve payment issues in prediction markets, the company shared exclusively with CNBC.
items.title_zh: 这家初创公司希望减少预测市场的支付摩擦
items.summary_zh: EDGE Markets 向 CNBC 独家透露，该公司宣布推出两款新产品，以解决预测市场的支付问题。

items.title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
items.summary: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.
items.title_zh: 香港IPO热潮正引发绩效问题
items.summary_zh: 随着香港与华尔街争夺最大的IPO市场，越来越多的上市前股价在上市后表现不佳。

items.title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
items.summary: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.
items.title_zh: 中国从美国挖走更多人工智能人才，着眼下一个“超级应用”
items.summary_zh: 从 OpenAI 加入腾讯的首席人工智能科学家姚舜宇周五表示，他的目标是追求通用人工智能。

items.title: Kalshi is building a prediction markets 'Bloomberg Terminal' for high-end traders, source says
items.summary: The prediction market platform is developing the platform to create a singular platform for its highly engaged traders.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，Kalshi 正在为高端交易者建立预测市场“彭博终端”
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台正在开发该平台，为其高度参与的交易者创建一个单一的平台。

items.title: US strikes Iran in response to downing of helicopter, military says
items.summary: President Donald Trump earlier accused Iran of shooting down the US helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz and vowed to respond.
items.title_zh: 军方表示，美国对伊朗进行打击，以回应直升机被击落事件
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普早些时候指责伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡击落美国直升机，并誓言做出回应。

items.title: World's largest chipmaker does not rule out price rises as costs increase
items.summary: In a rare interview, a senior executive at TSMC discusses the AI boom, the geopolitics of chips and what it means for the price of electronics.
items.title_zh: 全球最大芯片制造商不排除因成本增加而涨价
items.summary_zh: 在一次罕见的采访中，台积电的一位高管讨论了人工智能的繁荣、芯片的地缘政治及其对电子产品价格的影响。

items.title: Nasa names next astronauts for Artemis Moon programme
items.summary: Nasa names its next Artemis crew, though they will not be walking on the Moon or even going anywhere near it.
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局任命阿尔忒弥斯月球计划的下一任宇航员
items.summary_zh: 美国宇航局任命了下一批阿尔忒弥斯宇航员，尽管他们不会在月球上行走，甚至不会去任何靠近月球的地方。

items.title: Man reportedly shot at Kenya protest against US Ebola quarantine centre
items.summary: Protesters are concerned about cross-border infection risks and the lack of transparency from the government about the treatment centre.
items.title_zh: 据报道，一名男子在肯尼亚抗议美国埃博拉检疫中心时被枪杀
items.summary_zh: 抗议者担心跨境感染风险以及政府对治疗中心缺乏透明度。

items.title: Two reportedly killed as women take part in rare protest in Afghanistan
items.summary: The demonstration, in the western city of Herat, was broken up after police are alleged to have opened fire.
items.title_zh: 据报道，阿富汗妇女参加罕见抗议活动时造成两人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据称，警方开枪后，西部城市赫拉特的示威活动被驱散。

items.title: I have right papers and visa - barred referee Artan
items.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan says he was subjected to an 11-hour immigration interview before being denied entry to the United States for the World Cup despite holding the "right papers" and "right visa".
items.title_zh: 我有正确的文件和签证 - 被禁止的裁判 Artan
items.summary_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦表示，尽管他持有“正确的文件”和“正确的签证”，但在被拒绝进入美国观看世界杯之前，他接受了长达 11 小时的移民面试。

items.title: A Challenge in the U.S.-Iran Talks: Both Sides Demand Victory
items.summary: Washington and Tehran would need to defend any potential deal as a win for their side. And each has a leader whose approach to talks is vexing mediators.
items.title_zh: 美伊谈判面临挑战：双方都要求胜利
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿和德黑兰需要捍卫任何潜在的协议，作为他们一方的胜利。每个国家都有一位领导人，其谈判方式令调解人烦恼。

items.title: Infantino’s Yearslong Effort to Woo Trump for the World Cup
items.summary: Gianni Infantino, the FIFA president, has unabashedly courted the president’s favor. Soccer officials privately ask, who really benefits?
items.title_zh: 因凡蒂诺多年来努力争取特朗普参加世界杯
items.summary_zh: 国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺毫不掩饰地讨好总统。足球官员私下问，谁真正受益？

items.title: Why a U.K. By-Election in Makerfield Could Topple Prime Minister Keir Starmer
items.summary: Andy Burnham, the mayor of Greater Manchester, is running for a seat in Parliament. It’s a vital step in a campaign to oust his party colleague Prime Minister Keir Starmer.
items.title_zh: 为什么英国在梅克菲尔德举行的补选可能会推翻首相凯尔·斯塔默
items.summary_zh: 大曼彻斯特市长安迪·伯纳姆正在竞选议会席位。这是驱逐他的党内同僚、总理基尔·斯塔默的运动中至关重要的一步。

items.title: One of Pope Leo’s Best Friends Works in Spain. They Talk About Cars.
items.summary: Pope Leo and Armando Jesús Lovera have known each other for decades. They have watched World Cup games together, gone on road trips and once searched for a teddy bear for Mr. Lovera’s future wife.
items.title_zh: 利奥教皇最好的朋友之一在西班牙工作。他们谈论汽车。
items.summary_zh: 教皇利奥和阿曼多·赫苏斯·洛维拉相识数十年。他们一起观看了世界杯比赛，一起公路旅行，还曾为洛维拉先生未来的妻子寻找一只泰迪熊。

items.title: Somali Referee Says His World Cup Dream Is Dashed After U.S. Denies Entry
items.summary: “I had the right papers and everything,” Omar Abdulkadir Artan said in his first interview since he was turned back. He would have been the first Somali to referee a game in the tournament.
items.title_zh: 索马里裁判称美国拒绝参赛后他的世界杯梦想破灭
items.summary_zh: “我有正确的文件和一切，”奥马尔·阿卜杜勒卡迪尔·阿尔坦(Omar Abdulkadir Artan)在被遣返回后的第一次采访中说道。他将成为第一位在该赛事中担任裁判的索马里人。

items.title: Many Feared Trapped Under Earthquake Rubble in Philippines
items.summary: Families hope to recover their loved ones after the most powerful earthquake in 50 years to hit the Philippines.
items.title_zh: 许多人担心菲律宾被困在地震废墟下
items.summary_zh: 菲律宾遭遇 50 年来最强烈的地震，家人希望能找到亲人。

items.title: Man Arrested in ‘Brutal’ Stabbing in Belfast, Police Say
items.summary: The suspect, who the police said is 30 and Sudanese, was charged with having attacked another man in an assault in Belfast that was recorded and spread quickly online.
items.title_zh: 警方称，贝尔法斯特一名男子因“残酷”刺伤事件被捕
items.summary_zh: 警方称，这名嫌疑人现年 30 岁，是苏丹人，他被指控在贝尔法斯特的一次袭击中袭击了另一名男子，该袭击事件被记录下来并在网上迅速传播。

items.title: Crypto tax bills a work-in-progress as U.S. House lawmakers pose concerns
items.summary: The effort to push several tax bills is meant to be bipartisan, but the parties may not be comfortable with all details of the seven bills weighed by the panel.
items.title_zh: 美国众议院议员提出担忧，加密税法案正在进行中
items.summary_zh: 推动几项税收法案的努力本应是两党共同努力的，但两党可能对专家组权衡的七项法案的所有细节感到不满意。

items.title: Securitize CEO says tokenized stocks could unlock a $5 trillion crypto market
items.summary: At a panel at ETHConf, Carlos Domingo argued that bringing stocks and exchange-traded funds onchain could unlock a market far larger than today's roughly $30 billion tokenized asset sector.
items.title_zh: Securitize 首席执行官表示，代币化股票可以解锁 5 万亿美元的加密市场
items.summary_zh: 在 ETHConf 的一次小组讨论中，卡洛斯·多明戈 (Carlos Domingo) 认为，将股票和交易所交易基金引入链上可以释放一个远大于当今约 300 亿美元的代币化资产领域的市场。

items.title: UK financial regulator moves to allow mutual funds 10% exposure to crypto ETNs
items.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority proposed allowing some investment schemes to add exposure to crypto exchange-traded notes.
items.title_zh: 英国金融监管机构允许共同基金 10% 投资加密货币 ETN
items.summary_zh: 金融行为监管局提议允许一些投资计划增加对加密货币交易所交易票据的投资。

items.title: Trad.Fi, W3 target $650 million in onchain private credit using AI evaluation
items.summary: Equipment-financing lender Trad.Fi is working with W3 to automate capital workflows and bring real-economy business lending onto public blockchain rails.
items.title_zh: Trad.Fi、W3 的目标是利用人工智能评估实现 6.5 亿美元的链上私人信贷
items.summary_zh: 设备融资贷款机构 Trad.Fi 正在与 W3 合作，实现资本工作流程自动化，并将实体经济商业贷款纳入公共区块链轨道。

items.title: Ethena lands Janus Henderson backing as asset manager invests in ENA, eyes USDe distribution
items.summary: The deal underscores the trend of traditional asset managers backing DeFi infrastructure, following BlackRock's Uniswap and Apollo's Morpho investments.
items.title_zh: Ethena 获得 Janus Henderson 的支持，资产管理公司投资 ENA，着眼于 USDe 分配
items.summary_zh: 该交易凸显了继贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的 Uniswap 和阿波罗 (Apollo) 的 Morpho 投资之后，传统资产管理公司支持 DeFi 基础设施的趋势。

items.title: A16z, Paradigm lead $175 million bet to move global credit markets onchain
items.summary: Morpho secured $175 million from Paradigm, a16z crypto and Ribbit as the lending protocol seeks to become foundational infrastructure for onchain credit markets.
items.title_zh: A16z 和 Paradigm 领投 1.75 亿美元，推动全球信贷市场上链
items.summary_zh: Morpho 从 Paradigm、a16z crypto 和 Ribbit 获得了 1.75 亿美元的融资，该贷款协议旨在成为链上信贷市场的基础设施。

items.title: House crypto tax hearing reveals divide over urgency in advancing legislation
items.summary: A House committee hearing on the taxation of digital assets offered a glimpse into lawmakers' views, highlighting rifts in approaches.
items.title_zh: 众议院加密货币税收听证会揭示了推进立法紧迫性的分歧
items.summary_zh: 众议院委员会关于数字资产征税的听证会让我们了解了立法者的观点，凸显了方法上的分歧。

items.title: Hyperliquid advocate and Paradigm urge US to revise proposed anti-money laundering rule
items.summary: The Hyperliquid-backed lobby group and Paradigm seek to prevent rules that would limit decentralized stablecoin usage on public blockchains.
items.title_zh: 超流动性倡导者和范式敦促美国修改拟议的反洗钱规则
items.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 支持的游说团体和 Paradigm 寻求阻止限制公共区块链上去中心化稳定币使用的规则。

items.title: ‘Third leg of the stool:’ House lawmakers set to debate crypto tax bills as questions still loom
items.summary: Lawmakers are set to debate several cryptocurrency tax bills amid growing questions over how tax rules should apply to digital assets.
items.title_zh: “凳子的第三条腿”：众议院议员将就加密税法案进行辩论，因为问题仍然存在
items.summary_zh: 随着税收规则如何适用于数字资产的问题越来越多，立法者将就几项加密货币税收法案进行辩论。

items.title: New Aave risk framework proposed following KelpDAO exploit
items.summary: Aave founder Stani Kulechov said once the proposal passes the framework will be applied across all markets and assets.
items.title_zh: KelpDAO 漏洞利用后提出的新 Aave 风险框架
items.summary_zh: Aave 创始人 Stani Kulechov 表示，一旦提案通过，该框架将适用于所有市场和资产。

items.title: Janus Henderson takes ENA position, eyes regulated investment products tied to Ethena
items.summary: Janus Henderson took an ENA position and outlined plans for regulated investment products tied to the Ethena ecosystem.
items.title_zh: Janus Henderson 接手 ENA 职位，关注与 Ethena 相关的受监管投资产品
items.summary_zh: Janus Henderson 采取了 ENA 立场，并概述了与 Ethena 生态系统相关的受监管投资产品的计划。

items.title: Morpho raises $175M in round co-led by Paradigm, a16z crypto and Ribbit Capital to build ‘open credit network’
items.summary: Morpho plans to build an open blockchain-based credit network to connect decentralized finance, Wall Street, and global markets.
items.title_zh: Morpho 在 Paradigm、a16z crypto 和 Ribbit Capital 联合领投的一轮融资中筹集了 1.75 亿美元，以建立“开放信用网络”
items.summary_zh: Morpho 计划建立一个基于区块链的开放信用网络，连接去中心化金融、华尔街和全球市场。

items.title: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex to build without limits
items.summary: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex with GPT-5.5 to investigate hard-to-reproduce issues, build across platforms, and focus on product outcomes.
items.title_zh: Nextdoor 的工程师如何使用 Codex 进行无限制的构建

items.summary_zh: Notion 如何使用 Codex 制定一次性规范、为网络构建 AI 语音输入以及在小型团队中倍增工程能力。

items.title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC

items.summary_zh: OpenAI 确认已向 SEC 提交机密 S-1，但尚未确定采取进一步行动的时间。

items.summary_zh: 人工智能未来的愿景，重点关注接入、安全和共享繁荣，OpenAI 致力于确保 AGI 惠及每个人。

items.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.
items.title_zh: 梦想：更好的记忆力，更有用的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了新的记忆系统，可以更好地记住偏好，使对话中的上下文保持新鲜和相关。

items.title_zh: 语音代理可以处理双语客户吗？语码转换语音的前沿 ASR 基准测试
